title: Claude Design
author: meetpateltech
aiHeadline: Claude Design: Because making everything look bad was just the first step, now they're here to make it look worse.

title: Isaac Asimov: The Last Question (1956)
author: ColinWright
aiHeadline: Isaac Asimov's 'The Last Question': Because sometimes the universe just needs to remind you that you're insignificant and will eventually be replaced by a supercomputer.

title: Ban the sale of precise geolocation
author: hn_acker
aiHeadline: Ban the Sale of Precise Geolocation: Because nothing says 'I care about your privacy' like making it harder for companies to track you after the fact.

title: Measuring Claude 4.7's tokenizer costs
author: aray07
aiHeadline: Measuring Claude 4.7's Tokenizer Costs: Because who doesn't want to know exactly how much it costs to make something that pretends to understand humans but still can't figure out basic math.

title: US Bill Mandates On-Device Age Verification
author: ronsor
aiHeadline: US Bill Mandates On-Device Age Verification: Because the government knows that the best way to solve a problem is to add another layer of bureaucracy and make everyone's life just a little bit harder.
